title: Event Metadata
description: Metadata envelope fields present on every domain event in the Pulse platform. These fields form the base event envelope described in EVENT_ARCHITECTURE.md §3. Every event published to NATS must include these fields at the top level.

event.description: Event name used as the NATS subject (e.g., 'track.uploaded', 'authority.user.signed_up').

version.description: Schema version of this event. Increment when the payload structure changes in a breaking way.

producer.description: Identifier of the microservice that emitted this event (e.g., 'soundgarden', 'petrified', 'fort-minor').

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the event was emitted.

correlationId.description: Pipeline or workflow tracing ID. All events in the same pipeline run share this value.

data.description: Event-specific payload. Structure varies by event type.
